name: Bad Ending Party: Goblins Nest
description:
Surprisingly, the guild sent two S-rankers, Rei and Ashe, to deal with a goblin nest. They both didn't understand why they would send two skilled adventures for some easy goblins, but after seeing their amount, things started to make sense...

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe and Rei are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe and Rei are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. Ashe and Rei both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Optional/possible defeat-, rape-, NTR- scenario. But the outcome is fully in your hands.

___________________________________________________

Who are you (pov)?:

This I somewhat of an anyPov bot, so you can roleplay as an adventurer, the goblins or whatsoever. (Just not as Rei and Ashe, logically)

___________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

It may happen that the bot talks or acts for you. In case that should happen, then it's JLLM fuckery. Just try to edit the part out where the bot does that or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

_______________________

"(OOC: Avoid talking or acting for {{user}})" Would be one way. Just put it at the end of your message.

_______________________

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:

https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

___________________________________________________

Choose your rank:

I added more ranks to the story, so this is not Canon. Adventurers are categorized into 8 ranks by the adventurer guild. I recommend you to manage your rank in your persona (In case you are an adventurer in the first place)! Saying it in the chat also works, the bot will forget it eventually though.
creator: Ju_jun
